summary: FaraLink POS App - Responsive Testing Complete. All 13 responsive features tested successfully on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), and desktop (1920px). The app displays excellently across all viewport sizes with proper grid layouts, sidebar hamburger menu, stacking components, and modal dialogs.
passed_tests: Login page responsive - displays centered on mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1920px)
Login form elements (email, password, submit) visible and accessible on all viewports
Login features icons (PC, Tablette, Mobile, Synchronisé) visible on all viewports
Dashboard stat cards stack in single column on mobile (375px)
Dashboard stat cards display in 2 columns on tablet (768px)
Dashboard stat cards display in 4 columns on desktop (1920px)
Hamburger menu button (data-testid=mobile-menu-btn) visible on screens < 1024px
Hamburger menu hidden on desktop (1920px)
Sidebar opens/closes correctly with hamburger menu on mobile
Navigation between pages using sidebar on mobile works correctly
10 navigation items visible in sidebar on mobile
POS products grid and cart stack vertically on mobile/tablet (< 1024px)
POS products grid side-by-side with cart on desktop (1920px)
POS product cards compact (min-width 100px grid) on mobile
POS payment modal displays correctly on mobile (375px) - max-height 90vh
Payment methods (Espèces, Mobile Money, Carte) display in 3 columns on all viewports
Quick amount buttons wrap properly on mobile
Add client button (+) visible and clickable on mobile POS
Add client modal opens correctly on mobile
Price editing in cart works on mobile - input appears on click
Products table horizontal scroll enabled on mobile
Clients page responsive on mobile - search and table scrollable
Settings page responsive - form fields stack in single column on mobile
Settings grid adapts to viewport (single column mobile, multi-column desktop)
Modal dialogs respect max-height 90vh on mobile
context_for_next_testing_agent: All responsive features working correctly. App tested on 375px (mobile), 768px (tablet), and 1920px (desktop). Hamburger menu works on screens < 1024px. POS stacks products above cart on mobile/tablet. Payment modal max-height 90vh respected. Settings form stacks single column on mobile.

login_page.mobile_375px: PASS - Form centered, all elements visible
login_page.desktop_1920px: PASS - Form centered, device icons visible

dashboard.mobile_375px: PASS - Stats single column, hamburger menu visible
dashboard.tablet_768px: PASS - Stats 2 columns, hamburger menu visible
dashboard.desktop_1920px: PASS - Stats 4 columns, sidebar always visible

sidebar_hamburger.navigation: PASS - Can navigate to all pages from mobile sidebar

pos_module.mobile_375px: PASS - Products and cart stack vertically
pos_module.tablet_768px: PASS - Products and cart stack vertically
pos_module.desktop_1920px: PASS - Products grid with cart sidebar
